name: Solana Bootcamp - SuperBank
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y locales && sudo locale-gen en_US.UTF-8 && curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSfL https://solana-install.solana.workers.dev | bash && sudo ln -sf /home/vscode/.local/share/solana/install/active_release/bin/* /usr/local/bin/ && sudo ln -sf /home/vscode/.avm/bin/anchor /usr/local/bin/anchor
